items.title: Boehringer Ingelheim launches AI centre in London
items.summary: The new site will focus on the use of AI models for purposes including the discovery and development of targeted medicines for patients with unmet medical needs.

items.title: Beyond GLP-1Rs: emerging targets poised to gain share of obesity market
items.summary: Non-GLP-1 obesity drugs are emerging in the market, with this landscape expected to surge 50-fold, generating $15.5bn in 2031.

items.title: Trump backs psychedelics for mental health in new executive order
items.summary: Trump's executive order sets out to speed up the review of psychedelics, while supporting research into this burgeoning field.

items.title: UCB to purchase Neurona and NRTX-1001 for $1.15bn
items.summary: UCB has signed a definitive agreement to acquire Neurona Therapeutics in a deal worth up to $1.15bn, adding the latter’s lead asset NRTX-1001 to its epilepsy portfolio.

items.title: Magazine: Digital twins become the new battleground for CDMOs
items.summary: In this issue: CDMOs use of digital twins to realise a strategic advantage, Physical AI's rise in pharma manufacturing, and more.
